title: Sidestick Mod
body:
# Use your **Thrustmaster Airbus Sidestick** in Minecraft!

**Currently only compatible with [TCA Sidestick Airbus Edition](https://support.thrustmaster.com/en/product/tca-sidestick-airbus-edition-en/)**

_If it does not seem to work try installing the [Thrustmaster Sidestick driver](https://support.thrustmaster.com/en/product/tca-sidestick-airbus-edition-en/#:~:text=Throttle%20Modes%0APC-,Drivers,-Drivers%20%2D%20Package%202024_TFHT_1)_
